player.description: Deep-sea submersible vessel top-down view, sleek torpedo-shaped hull, glowing cyan bioluminescent propellers, neon teal engine glow

enemy.description: Giant anglerfish enemy top-down view, prehistoric deep-sea monster, bioluminescent lure, orange-red eyes

boss.description: Colossal giant squid boss top-down view, massive kraken-like tentacles, iridescent purple-black skin, bioluminescent green patterns

pearl.description: Bioluminescent deep-sea pearl collectible, round pearl with inner teal-violet glow, sparkle effects

crystal.description: Bonus pearl crystal collectible (reuses pearl asset)

token.description: REEF token coin icon for CrossRamp exchange

playerBullet.description: Torpedo projectile bullet, bright cyan-teal energy trail, vertical elongated shape

enemyBullet.description: Venomous ink blob projectile from deep-sea enemy, dark purple-black circular glob with violet bioluminescent glow

ocean.description: Deep ocean vertical scrolling background, dark abyss, coral reef silhouettes, bioluminescent sea plants, navy blue water
